race.comment: LET'SFACETHEMUSIC (4) continued his fine form this prep with an eye-catching fifth in the Listed Lightning over 1000m at Eagle Farm five weeks ago. Last appeared in a Class 3 in April and won by three lengths at this track. Won't spend a penny from the inside alley so a third win for the prep is there for the taking. BRAVEHEART (1) is a model of consistency. Lined up in a weaker race over this course and distance 17 days ago when he showed plenty of fight to hang on after leading. Needs to step up to Saturday company now but cannot be underestimated. LARADO (3) returns from a 21-week spell. Has only raced five times for three wins, all at 1000m. New challenge this prep but a huge recent trial win is an encouraging sign. HOT WINGS (11) returned in good order at the Gold Coast recently. Lightly raced mare who is capable of taking it to the next level this time in work. Market watch on SYDNEY BOWLER (8) first-up from a spell and now with Tony Gollan.
